title: Change Management Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger change management foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Change Management Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Change Management Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good change management foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Change Management Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
